Deployments_CreateOrUpdate.displayName: Create or update a template deployment

parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the ID for every Azure resource.

parameters.name: Resource Group
parameters.description: Resource group name.

parameters.name: Deployment Name
parameters.description: The name of the deployment.

parameters.name: Template Content
parameters.description: The template content. It can be a JObject or a well formed JSON string. Use only one of Template or TemplateLink.

parameters.name: Template URI
parameters.description: URI referencing the template.

parameters.name: Template Content Version
parameters.description: If included it must match the ContentVersion in the template.

parameters.name: Parameters
parameters.description: Deployment parameters. It can be a JObject or a well formed JSON string. Use only one of Parameters or ParametersLink.

parameters.name: Parameters URI
parameters.description: URI referencing the template.

parameters.name: Parameters Content Version
parameters.description: If included it must match the ContentVersion in the template.

parameters.name: Deployment Mode
parameters.description: The deployment mode.

parameters.name: Detail Level
parameters.description: The debug detail level.

parameters.name: Wait for Deployment
parameters.description: If the action should wait until deployment is completed

ResourceGroups_CreateOrUpdate.displayName: Create or update a resource group

parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the ID for every Azure resource.

parameters.name: Resource Group Name
parameters.description: The name of the resource group to be created or updated.

parameters.name: Id
parameters.description: The ID of the resource group (e.g. /subscriptions/XXX/resourceGroups/YYY).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: The Name of the resource group.

parameters.name: Location
parameters.description: The location of the resource group. It cannot be changed after the resource group has been created. Has to be one of the supported Azure Locations, such as West US, East US, West Europe, East Asia, etc.

parameters.name: Managed By
parameters.description: Id of the resource that manages this resource group.

parameters.name: Tags
parameters.description: The tags attached to the resource group.

parameters.name: Provisioning State
parameters.description: The provisioning state.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the ID for every Azure resource.

parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the ID for every Azure resource.

parameters.name: Resource Group
parameters.description: Resource group name.

parameters.name: resources
parameters.description: The ids of the resources. The only supported string currently is '\*' (all resources). Future api updates will support exporting specific resources.

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: The export template options. Supported values include 'IncludeParameterDefaultValue', 'IncludeComments' or 'IncludeParameterDefaultValue, IncludeComments
